RFQ — REQUEST FOR QUOTATION

Submit a FormalQuotation Request

Complete the technical manifest below for a priced offer from our commodity desks. All fields marked with an asterisk are required for desk routing. Submissions are subject to mandatory KYC pre-screening.

Response Time
< 24 Hours
KYC Pre-Screening
Mandatory
Desk Routing
Automatic by Commodity
01COUNTERPARTY IDENTIFICATION
02COMMODITY SPECIFICATION
03TRADE TERMS & LOGISTICS
04ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS
Trade Finance Required?
Third-Party Inspection?

By submitting you consent to AML/KYC pre-screening per FATF guidelines and XRT's Privacy Policy. All data is transmitted over TLS 1.3.

DESK CONTACTS
ENERGY DESK
HOU / RTM
energy@xrtgroup.com
AGRICULTURAL DESK
HOU / SGP
agro@xrtgroup.com
OILS DESK
SGP / RTM
oils@xrtgroup.com
AFTER SUBMISSION
0–4 HRS

KYC pre-screening and desk routing confirmation.

4–24 HRS

Preliminary indication (PI) issued with price range and availability.

24–72 HRS

Full offer with contract draft and inspection terms.

T+4 DAYS

LC issuance or alternative payment terms finalized.

OPERATIONAL HUBS
HOU — Houston, USAUTC-6
RTM — Rotterdam, NLUTC+1
SGP — Singapore, SGPUTC+8
ALL SYSTEMS OPERATIONAL

Next-generation Strategic Procurement & Commodity Trading infrastructure. Sourcing without secrets. Logistics without friction.
